title: corybas carinulifer
intro: Corybas carinulifer, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corybas carinulifer are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from pain, and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema. In herbal preparations, Corybas carinulifer is often used in tea form or as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
